About Me

Hello! I'm a Computer Science Engineering student who is passionate about technology, programming, and web development. I enjoy building modern and responsive websites using HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, and JavaScript. I like solving problems and learning new technologies that help me improve my development skills. Currently, I am focusing on front-end development and working on small projects to gain real-world experience. My goal is to become a skilled software developer and work on innovative projects that create useful solutions for people.
